record.field: Executive KPI Row
5 KPI cards showing key HHA metrics: Total Admits, Avg Daily Census, Visits/Admit, Revenue/Visit, Quality Rating. Designed for the top of an overview page.
kpi

[ { "chart_type": "kpi", "name": "Total Admits", "col_span": "3", "query_sql": "SELECT SUM(total_admits) AS total_admits FROM mv_hha_kpi_summary WHERE hha_state = %(hha_state)s", "x_column": "total_admits", "kpi_format": "number", "color_palette": "healthcare" }, { "chart_type": "kpi", "name": "Avg Daily Census", "col_span": "3", "query_sql": "SELECT AVG(adc) AS adc FROM mv_hha_kpi_summary WHERE hha_state = %(hha_state)s", "x_column": "adc", "kpi_format": "decimal", "color_palette": "healthcare" }, { "chart_type": "kpi", "name": "Visits / Admit", "col_span": "3", "query_sql": "SELECT AVG(visits_per_admit) AS visits_per_admit FROM mv_hha_kpi_summary WHERE hha_state = %(hha_state)s", "x_column": "visits_per_admit", "kpi_format": "decimal", "color_palette": "healthcare" }, { "chart_type": "kpi", "name": "Revenue / Visit", "col_span": "3", "query_sql": "SELECT AVG(revenue_per_visit) AS revenue_per_visit FROM mv_hha_kpi_summary WHERE hha_state = %(hha_state)s", "x_column": "revenue_per_visit", "kpi_format": "currency", "kpi_prefix": "$", "color_palette": "healthcare" }, { "chart_type": "kpi", "name": "Quality Rating", "col_span": "3", "query_sql": "SELECT AVG(quality_rating) AS quality_rating FROM mv_hha_kpi_summary WHERE hha_state = %(hha_state)s", "x_column": "quality_rating", "kpi_format": "decimal", "kpi_suffix": "\u2605", "color_palette": "healthcare" } ]
Payer Mix Trend
Stacked bar chart showing payer distribution over time. X-axis is year, series split by payer type (FFS, MA, Medicaid, etc.).
trend

[ { "chart_type": "bar", "name": "Payer Mix by Year", "col_span": "12", "chart_height": 400, "query_sql": "SELECT year, payer_type, SUM(episode_count) AS episodes FROM mv_hha_payer_mix WHERE hha_state = %(hha_state)s GROUP BY year, payer_type ORDER BY year", "x_column": "year", "y_columns": "episodes", "series_column": "payer_type", "color_palette": "healthcare" } ]
Market Position Radar
Radar/spider chart comparing 5 dimensions (Quality, Revenue, Outcomes, Timely Access, Volume) between your portfolio and state median.
comparison

[ { "chart_type": "radar", "name": "Market Position Radar", "col_span": "6", "chart_height": 400, "query_sql": "SELECT dimension, your_score, state_median FROM mv_hha_market_position WHERE hha_name = %(hha_name)s", "x_column": "dimension", "y_columns": "your_score,state_median", "color_palette": "healthcare" } ]
Peer Profile Table
Ranked data table showing peer HHAs with key metrics: Admits, Market Share %, ADV Percentile, TCS Percentile. HHA Name column is linkable.
ranking

[ { "chart_type": "table", "name": "Peer HHA Rankings", "col_span": "12", "query_sql": "SELECT rank, hha_name, admits, mkt_share_pct, adv_percentile, tcs_percentile FROM mv_hha_peer_ranking WHERE hha_state = %(hha_state)s ORDER BY rank LIMIT 25", "x_column": "hha_name", "y_columns": "admits,mkt_share_pct,adv_percentile,tcs_percentile", "click_action": "show_details", "drill_detail_columns": "hha_name,hha_state,hha_county,admits,adc,quality_rating", "color_palette": "healthcare" } ]
Market Operating Profile
3 gauge + KPI widgets showing operating archetypes: Access Driven Volume, Therapy Centric Stabilizer, High Acuity Specialist.
profile

[ { "chart_type": "gauge_kpi", "name": "Access Driven Volume", "col_span": "4", "chart_height": 350, "query_sql": "SELECT adv_score, ffs_pct, ma_pct, ffs_pct_label, ma_pct_label, alert_text FROM mv_hha_operating_profile WHERE hha_name = %(hha_name)s AND archetype = 'ADV'", "x_column": "adv_score", "gauge_min": 0, "gauge_max": 100, "gauge_color_mode": "traffic_light", "gauge_warn_threshold": 40, "gauge_good_threshold": 70, "gauge_sub_kpi_columns": "ffs_pct,ma_pct", "gauge_sub_kpi_labels": "FFS,MA", "gauge_sub_label_columns": "ffs_pct_label,ma_pct_label", "gauge_alert_column": "alert_text", "color_palette": "healthcare" }, { "chart_type": "gauge_kpi", "name": "Therapy Centric Stabilizer", "col_span": "4", "chart_height": 350, "query_sql": "SELECT tcs_score, therapy_pct, nursing_pct, therapy_pct_label, nursing_pct_label, alert_text FROM mv_hha_operating_profile WHERE hha_name = %(hha_name)s AND archetype = 'TCS'", "x_column": "tcs_score", "gauge_min": 0, "gauge_max": 100, "gauge_color_mode": "traffic_light", "gauge_warn_threshold": 40, "gauge_good_threshold": 70, "gauge_sub_kpi_columns": "therapy_pct,nursing_pct", "gauge_sub_kpi_labels": "Therapy,Nursing", "gauge_sub_label_columns": "therapy_pct_label,nursing_pct_label", "gauge_alert_column": "alert_text", "color_palette": "healthcare" }, { "chart_type": "gauge_kpi", "name": "High Acuity Specialist", "col_span": "4", "chart_height": 350, "query_sql": "SELECT has_score, avg_visits, avg_los, avg_visits_label, avg_los_label, alert_text FROM mv_hha_operating_profile WHERE hha_name = %(hha_name)s AND archetype = 'HAS'", "x_column": "has_score", "gauge_min": 0, "gauge_max": 100, "gauge_color_mode": "traffic_light", "gauge_warn_threshold": 40, "gauge_good_threshold": 70, "gauge_sub_kpi_columns": "avg_visits,avg_los", "gauge_sub_kpi_labels": "Avg Visits,Avg LOS", "gauge_sub_label_columns": "avg_visits_label,avg_los_label", "gauge_alert_column": "alert_text", "color_palette": "healthcare" } ]
Insights Banner
Insight panel with classification badge, 3 metric columns (pre/post comparison), and a narrative template. Ideal for top-of-page strategic context.
overview

[ { "chart_type": "insight_panel", "name": "Strategic Insight", "col_span": "12", "query_sql": "SELECT classification, metric1, metric2, metric3 FROM mv_hha_insights WHERE hha_name = %(hha_name)s LIMIT 1", "metric1_label": "Pre-PDGM Avg (2017-19)", "metric2_label": "Post-COVID Avg (2023-25)", "metric3_label": "Drift", "narrative_template": "%(hha_name)s in %(hha_state)s has a %(classification)s operating trajectory. The pre-PDGM therapy mix averaged %(metric1)s, shifting to %(metric2)s in the post-COVID era — a drift of %(metric3)s.", "color_palette": "healthcare" } ]
